mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.name as courseName, t.name as teacherName, c.credit FROM selection s LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} AND t.status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO selection (student_id, course_id, select_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, NOW())
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM selection WHERE course_id IN
#{courseId}
